name: stem-methods
description: Fifteen evidence-based teaching methods for math, science, engineering, computing, and statistics — mapped to Faraday block families (not 1:1 blocks). Complements lecture-design (universal moves) and audience (learner population). Skill-only; opt-in via `faraday pack add stem-methods`.

skill.loadWhen: you are teaching math, science, engineering, computing, or statistics and need a discipline-appropriate unit arc beyond the audience default
